Name: SA Agricultural Development Bond 2025 – Grain Tranche A
Description: 7-year agricultural development bond backed by Free State and North West grain farm tokens. Covers wheat, maize and sunflower crop assets. Coupon: 9.25% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved. Climate Bond Initiative certified.

Name: SA Agricultural Development Bond 2025 – Livestock Tranche B
Description: 5-year agricultural bond backed by Karoo Merino sheep and Northern Cape livestock tokens. Covers herd valuations and wool warehouse receipts. Coupon: 9.00% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Agricultural Development Bond 2025 – Horticulture Tranche C
Description: 5-year bond backed by Limpopo macadamia, avocado and mango orchard tokens. Backed by 14 certified GLOBALG.A.P. farm assets. Coupon: 9.75% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Agricultural Development Bond 2025 – Viticulture Tranche D
Description: 7-year bond backed by Boland Wine Estate vineyard blocks and cellar equipment tokens. Covers 185 ha of Cabernet Sauvignon and Chenin Blanc vineyards. Coupon: 8.75% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Agricultural Development Bond 2025 – Irrigation Infrastructure Tranche E
Description: 10-year infrastructure bond backed by DALRRD irrigation scheme tokens and water use authorisation certificates from Orange River and Berg River WUAs. Coupon: 8.50% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series I (Manufacturing)
Description: 3-year SME bond backing Gauteng manufacturing micro-enterprises. Backed by 145 tokenized equipment and SMEAsset tokens. Coupon: 11.50% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved. SEDA-endorsed.

Name: SA SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series II (Agricultural SME)
Description: 5-year SME bond targeting emerging farmer enterprises and rural agri-SMEs. Backed by 88 SME agri-asset tokens from DALRRD-registered enterprises. Coupon: 10.75% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series III (Township Economy)
Description: 5-year BBBEE township economy bond for Level 1–2 BBBEE-verified township businesses. Backed by 220 tokenized SMEAsset and Invoice tokens. Coupon: 11.00% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series IV (Women & Youth)
Description: Impact SME bond for women-owned and youth-owned enterprises. Backed by 165 tokenized business assets. Coupon: 10.50% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved. dtic-endorsed impact designation.

Name: SA SME Growth Bond 2025 – Series V (Technology SME)
Description: 3-year innovation SME bond for ICT, fintech and agritech startups. Backed by 72 tokenized intangible and equipment assets with IP valuation. Coupon: 12.00% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Platinum Group Metals ETF – Class A
Description: JSE-listed ETF tracking tokenized platinum, palladium and rhodium royalty certificates from Bushveld and Waterberg mines. 64 mineral tokens in basket. Tracks NYMEX PGM indices. Management fee: 0.35% p.a.

Name: SA Gold & Precious Metals ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking AngloGold Ashanti and Gold Fields tokenized gold royalty and production certificates. 38 gold token positions. Tracks LBMA gold price. Management fee: 0.30% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Agricultural Commodity ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking tokenized SAFEX-listed grain commodity receipts (white maize, yellow maize, wheat, sunflower). Rebalanced quarterly. 92 warehouse receipt tokens. Management fee: 0.45% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Carbon Credit Commodity ETF – Class A
Description: ETF tracking South African carbon credit tokens from SACOAS registry (VCUs, CERs, REDD+ certificates). 58 carbon token positions. Climate Bond Initiative-aligned. Management fee: 0.50% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Diversified Hard Commodities ETF – Class A
Description: Diversified ETF tracking a basket of gold, platinum, iron ore and manganese token certificates. 110 underlying positions. Quarterly rebalancing. Management fee: 0.40% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: Old Mutual Green Economy Bond 2025 – Renewable Energy Tranche
Description: 10-year green bond financing South Africa’s solar and wind energy transition. Backed by Eskom RECertificate tokens and new solar IPP project tokens. Coupon: 8.50% p.a. JSE-listed. CBI-certified.

Name: Old Mutual Green Economy Bond 2025 – Carbon Credit Tranche
Description: 7-year green bond backed by South African carbon credit tokens and biodiversity credit certificates. CBI-certified. Coupon: 7.75% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: Old Mutual Green Economy Bond 2025 – Water Infrastructure Tranche
Description: 15-year green bond for water treatment and conservation infrastructure. Backed by DWS water infrastructure project tokens. CBI-certified. Coupon: 8.00% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: Old Mutual Green Economy Bond 2025 – Sustainable Agriculture Tranche
Description: 7-year bond financing climate-smart agriculture, conservation farming and soil health programmes. Backed by carbon credit and IrrigationRight tokens. CBI-certified. Coupon: 8.25% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: Old Mutual Green Economy Bond 2025 – Biodiversity & Conservation Tranche
Description: 10-year bond financing South African biodiversity protection and marine conservation. Backed by BiodiversityCredit tokens from DFFE. CBI-certified. Coupon: 7.50% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Smallholder Farmer Crop Micro-Insurance – Maize & Sorghum Index Cover
Description: Index-based crop micro-insurance for 2,800 smallholder farmers in Limpopo and Mpumalanga. Drought index trigger. Payout: R2,200/ha. Premium: R380/ha. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Smallholder Farmer Livestock Micro-Insurance – Cattle Mortality Cover
Description: Tokenized livestock micro-insurance covering 1,400 communal cattle farmers in Eastern Cape and KwaZulu-Natal against disease and drought mortality. Indemnity: R8,500/head. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA SME Business Interruption Micro-Insurance – Township Retailer Cover
Description: Micro-insurance policy for 3,200 BBBEE township spaza shops and retailers covering fire, theft, flooding. Benefit: R25,000 max. Premium: R85/month. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Artisanal Miner Micro-Insurance – Personal Accident Cover
Description: Tokenized personal accident insurance for 850 artisanal and informal miners in North West and Limpopo. Death benefit: R45,000; Disability: R30,000. Premium: R110/month. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Construction Worker Micro-Insurance – Occupational Injury Cover
Description: Tokenized occupational injury micro-insurance for 1,600 workers at CIDB-registered SME construction firms. Benefit: R60,000 max injury; R90,000 death. Premium: R145/month. FSCA-approved.
